complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.在主页点击 **工作列表** 进入 **数据分析报告** （路由 ``/work: On the Home page, click **Worklist** to open the **Data Analysis Report** (route ``/worklist``). The page has three sub-tabs — **Summary**, **Inspection Result**, and **Component** — that share the filter bar at the top; the content area switches with the selected tab.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**总结**：总览统计指标、不良/良品比环形图与前十不良元件柱状图。: **Summary**: overview metrics, the good/defective donut chart, and the top-10 NG components bar chart.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**检测结果**：逐条列出每次整板检测记录，可进入复检、导出报告。: **Inspection Result**: lists each whole-board inspection record; you can enter review and export a report.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**元件**：按元件维度汇总检测结果，支持 **全部** / **不良** /: **Component**: aggregates results by component, with an **All** / **NG** / **False alarm** toggle, plus a pie chart, a bar chart, and image viewing.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.过滤栏按功能分组。除 **序列号** 外，筛选条件修改后需点击底部的 **应用*: The filter bar is grouped by function. Except for **Serial no.**, filter changes take effect only when you click the **Apply** button at the bottom; **Serial no.** fires immediately on Enter or scanner input.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**日期范围**：**快选** 下拉（今天 / 昨天 / 本周 / 本月 / 今: **Date range**: a **Quick** dropdown (Today / Yesterday / This Week / This Month / This Year / All time / Custom) plus **Begin** and **End** dates. Editing a date directly switches the dropdown to **Custom**; choosing a preset overwrites both dates; **All time** clears the date constraint.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**识别**：**PCBA名称** 下拉选择已训练的基准产品；**序列号** 按: **Identification**: **PCBA name** (a dropdown of trained golden products); **Serial no.** filters by board serial number.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**归属**：**机台**、**操作员**。两者均为自动补全输入框，会建议历史会: **Attribution**: **Machine** and **Operator**. Both are autocomplete inputs that suggest values seen across past sessions; free text is also accepted.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**元件识别** \\ （仅 **元件** 标签页）：**位号**、**料号**: **Component identification** (Component tab only): **Designator** and **Part No.** text inputs.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**结果类型** \\ （仅 **元件** 标签页）：模式单选 **全部** /: **Result type** (Component tab only): a mode radio — **All** / **NG** / **False alarm** — plus an **Error types** multi-select list.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.过滤栏底部为 **最大显示数量** 输入框（默认 1000）与 **应用** 按: At the bottom of the filter bar are the **Max displayed count** input (default 1000) and the **Apply** button; changing the cap also takes effect only on **Apply**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**总结** 标签页由三个并列面板组成。: The **Summary** tab consists of three side-by-side panels.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.显示所选范围内的整体统计数据，分为两个区域：: Shows the overall statistics for the selected scope, in two areas:
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**PCBA**：检测总数、良好板数及占比、不良板数及占比。: **PCBA**: total inspected, good board count and ratio, defective board count and ratio.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**报警元件**：报警元件总数，以及经反馈确认的 **不良** 元件数及 PPM: **Alerted components**: the total alerted-component count, plus the feedback-confirmed **defective** count and its PPM, the **falsely-judged** count and its PPM, and defects per unit (**DPU**).
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.面板底部显示当前查询的时间范围。: The bottom of the panel shows the time range of the current query.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.以环形图展示合格与不良板件的数量与百分比。: A donut chart of the count and percentage of good vs defective boards.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.选定具体基准产品后，展示该产品下报警次数最多的前 10 个元件横向柱状图；未选择: Once a specific golden product is selected, shows a horizontal bar chart of the 10 most-alerted components for that product; if no product is selected, it prompts you to select one first.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**总结** 标签页同样受过滤栏 **机台** / **操作员** 过滤的影响，: The **Summary** tab is also affected by the filter bar's **Machine** / **Operator** filters, so its scope matches the other tabs.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.逐条列出每次整板检测记录。表头旁显示 **显示 X / Y 行** 指示器；当匹: Lists each whole-board inspection record. A **Displaying X of Y rows** indicator appears next to the table header; when the matched row count exceeds **Max displayed count**, a "truncated" note is appended and the table shows only the most recent rows. Columns:
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.本次检测所用基准产品名称。: The golden product used for this inspection.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.子板序列号（非拼板产品为空）。: Sub-board serial number (empty for non-panelized products).
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.经反馈确认为不良的元件数。: Number of components confirmed defective via feedback.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.系统报警但反馈为良品的元件数（报警数减去确认不良数）。: Number of components the system alerted but feedback marked good (alerted count minus confirmed-defective count).
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.操作员复核后的整板结论，由前端按下述规则推导。: The operator's post-review board verdict, derived on the frontend per the rule below.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.本次检测所属会话记录的操作员与 AOI 机台。: The operator and AOI machine recorded on the session this inspection belongs to.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**导出报告**（在新标签页打开详细报告）、**删除记录**。: **Export Report** (opens the detailed report in a new tab) and **Delete Record**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.列表顶部提供 **导出CSV** 与 **删除选中记录**，支持多选批量删除。: The top of the list offers **Export CSV** and **Delete selected records** (multi-select for batch deletion).
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**复核结果（整板）**：仅当该板已被操作员复核且反馈后无不良元件时显示 **良: **Review Result (board)**: shows **OK** only when the board has been reviewed by an operator and has no defective components after feedback; otherwise (including not-yet-reviewed AI-NG boards) it shows **NG**. This is stricter than the Home page yield convention — any board not reviewed by a human counts as **NG**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**元件** 标签页取代了旧版的 **不良元件** 与 **误判元件** 两个标: The **Component** tab replaces the former **NG Component** and **False Positive Component** tabs, presenting component-level results in a single list, with the **Result type** **All** / **NG** / **False alarm** radio to switch the viewed scope.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.页面左侧上方为元件表格、下方为图像查看区，右侧为图表区。表头旁同样显示 **显示: The left side stacks the component table (top) over the image-viewing area (bottom); the right side holds the charts. A **Displaying X of Y rows** indicator appears next to the table header. Columns: **PCBA name**, **Main SN**, **Panel SN**, **Designator**, **Part No.**, **Inspected error type**, **Review result**, **Review error type**, **Inspection start time**, **Operator**, **Machine**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**复核结果（元件）**：当元件检测通过，或反馈错误类型为\"无错误\"时显示: **Review Result (component)**: shows **OK** when the component passed inspection or its feedback error type is "no error"; otherwise **NG**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**饼图**：通过 **饼图字段** 下拉选择统计维度，可选 检测错误类型 /: **Pie chart**: pick the aggregation field from the **Pie target** dropdown — Inspected error type / Review error type / Machine / PCBA name / Review result — to aggregate proportions over the current filtered row set.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**柱状图**：通过下拉选择统计维度，可选 位号 / 料号 / 主序列号，展示出: **Bar chart**: pick the field from the dropdown — Designator / Part No. / Main SN — to show the **Top 10** by frequency. When the result is truncated, the title reads **Top 10 (within displayed)**, indicating the stats cover only the displayed rows.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.两个图表均随过滤条件与 **全部** / **不良** / **误报** 切换实: Both charts re-aggregate live on every filter change and on the **All** / **NG** / **False alarm** toggle.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.单击表格中任意一行，下方图像区显示该元件的 **检测图** 与 **基准图**：: Click any row in the table to show that component's **Inspection image** (the cropped inspection image) and **Reference image** (the golden reference) below. With no row selected it shows "Select a row to view images"; when there is no reference it shows "No reference image available".
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**元件** 标签页提供 **导出CSV** 与 **导出Excel** 两种方: The **Component** tab offers **Export CSV** and **Export Excel**. The exported Excel contains a data sheet plus a charts sheet — the current pie and bar charts embedded as images alongside their category-count tables (charts reflect the field selections at export time). Neither export includes component images.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**机台 / 操作员 的来源将在后续版本接入**；历史检测会话这两列可能为空，空: **The source of Machine / Operator will be wired in a later version**; for historical sessions these two columns may be empty, rendered as "—", and filtering by **Machine** / **Operator** excludes such unattributed records.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**元件** 标签页的图表与表格基于同一批已获取的行集聚合；当行数超过 **最大: The Component tab's charts and table aggregate from the same fetched row set; when the row count exceeds **Max displayed count**, both the table and the charts reflect only the displayed rows (the bar chart title shows **Top 10 (within displayed)**).
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**子板良率（FPY）与坏板标记**：对于拼板产品，良率可在 **整板** 与: **Sub-board first-pass yield (FPY) and badmarks**: for panelized products, yield can switch between **whole-board** and **sub-board** scope, counted against the number of sub-boards actually inspected; for non-panelized products the sub-board scope shows N/A. Components marked as **badmarks** drive the sub-board good/bad verdict but are **not counted** in the review NG list, nor in the Data Analysis Report's total / alert / NG statistics. The sub-board auto-scrap logic is configured in :ref:`检测设置（子板判废逻辑）`.
